content:
# session_92 (iter-092) ‚Äî build-completion iter (no prover lane)

## Metadata
- Sorry count before/after: 0 / 0 (project-wide; the lone `sorry` token is a stale docstring in `CechSectionIdentification.lean:20`).
- Targets attempted: none by a prover. This was a **build-completion iter**, not a passive no-dispatch iter.
- attempts_raw.jsonl: `no_prover_lane: true`.

## What happened
Plan-092 root-caused the iters 088‚Äì091 stall: those iters "re-triggered LSP elaboration via `lean_file_outline`" and waited for oleans, but **the LSP elaborates in-memory and never writes oleans** ‚Äî only `lake build`/`lake env lean` does. 4 iters of LSP-poking could not green the build gate. Plan-092 launched a detached real `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.CechToHigherDirectImage` (log `.archon/logs/iter-092/chain-build.log`), still alive at review time (PID 3281061).

## Build gate: PENDING ‚Äî actively progressing, no errors
| File | Olean | Stamp |
|------|-------|-------|
| CechSectionIdentificationBase | PRESENT | 11:26 (fresh) |
| CechSectionIdentificationLeg | PRESENT | 11:45 (fresh) |
| CechSectionIdentificationLegMid1 | PRESENT | 11:45 (fresh) |
| CechSectionIdentificationLegMid2 | PRESENT | 12:00 (fresh) |
| CechSectionIdentificationLegTop | ABSENT | elaborating |
| CechSectionIdentificationLegAux | ABSENT | queued (heaviest, 6.4M HB√ó2) |
| CechSectionIdentification | STALE | 19:59 Jun 18 (pre-split; rebuilds after Aux) |
| CechAugmentedResolution | STALE | 19:59 Jun 18 (rebuilds after CSI) |
| CechHigherDirectImage | STALE | 10:19 (rebuilds in chain) |
| CechToHigherDirectImage | ABSENT | final node |

Build log at `[8334/8340]`: Leg (710s), Mid1 (10s), Mid2 (509s) all built clean. Only `set_option maxHeartbeats`-comment and line-length style WARNINGS (non-blocking). Contrast iters 088‚Äì091: 4 fresh oleans landed THIS iter vs 0 across the prior four ‚Äî the real `lake build` is doing what LSP-poking could not.

## Checks
- **Blueprint doctor**: CLEAN (no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no `axiom` decls).
- **DAG**: gaps 0, unmatched 0, frontier 4 (Route-B residuals, all non-blocking to the proved deliverable):
  - `lem:cech_free_eval_prepend_homotopy` (effort 739, used-by 3) ‚Äî lean_name null
  - `lem:tile_section_comparison` (effort 5106, used-by 0) ‚Äî dead end
  - `lem:tilde_restrict_basicOpen` (effort 704, used-by 2) ‚Äî lean target `AlgebraicGeometry.tilde_restrict_basicOpen` absent
  - `lem:pushforward_commutes_restriction` (effort 1370, used-by 0) ‚Äî dead end
- **sync_leanok**: iter=92, sha=fdc694e, added 0 / removed 0, 1550s. (Ran 04:02 UTC, ahead of the fresh oleans.)

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
None.

## Notes (LOW)
- Style warnings to clear in polish: `maxHeartbeats`-without-comment across Mid1/Mid2/Top/Aux/CHDI; line-length >100 in CHDI and CechAcyclic.
- Stale docstring `CechSectionIdentification.lean:20` (mentions an upstream `coreIso_comm_leg` sorry that no longer exists).

## Recommendation for next session
No prover. Let the detached lake build run to CHDI. Next review: confirm CHDI olean present + sync_leanok confirms `\leanok` for `cech_computes_higherDirectImage` ‚Üí advance stage to **polish**. Do NOT re-trigger via LSP (`lean_file_outline`) ‚Äî that was the iters 088‚Äì091 failure mode. Do NOT edit any chain `.lean` file while the build runs (invalidates the cache replay).
